title: CrowdStrike Gains 4% as Morgan Stanley Names It a Top AI Security Bet
body: CrowdStrike (NASDAQ:CRWD) stock is trading up 4% in Monday afternoon trading, with shares around $383 after opening at $369.58. The move is a sharp reversal from last Friday's selloff, which sent CRWD shares tumbling alongside the broader cybersecurity sector.

title: There are more AI health tools than ever—but how well do they work?

title: Tech stocks today: Chip stocks resume sell-off, Mistral AI raises $830 million
body: Tech stocks remained under pressure on Monday after a brutal sell-off last week that sent the tech-heavy Nasdaq Composite (^IXIC) index into a correction. On Monday, French AI startup Mistral said it raised $830 million to finance a data center powered by Nvidia's (NVDA) advanced chips.

title: Claude attracts more users amid Anthropic's dispute with Pentagon over AI policies
body: Claude is seeing a rise in users as Anthropic's dispute with the Pentagon over AI policies continues to unfold.

title: As OpenAI goes to Washington, Anthropic goes viral: How the Pentagon feud fueled growth for Claude
body: Anthropic's AI chatbot, Claude, has seen a massive surge in paid subscribers, more than doubling this year. This growth coincides with a public dispute with the Pentagon over AI usage and a clever Super Bowl ad campaign targeting OpenAI.

title: GPT drafts, Claude critiques: Microsoft blends rival AI models in new Copilot upgrade
body: Microsoft is using Anthropic's Claude to fact-check work done by OpenAI's GPT inside Microsoft 365 Copilot, blending its new and old AI partnerships as it tries to accelerate adoption of its AI assistant for business.

title: Microsoft Made GPT and Claude Work Together—And the Result Beats Every AI Research Tool Out There
body: Microsoft's Copilot Researcher now puts GPT and Claude to work in sequence—and the combination just outscored every AI system around.

title: OpenAI patches ChatGPT flaw that smuggled data over DNS
body: OpenAI talks up data security for its AI services, yet Check Point says that ChatGPT allowed data to leak through a DNS side channel before the flaw was fixed. In February, the free-spending AI biz fixed a data exfiltration vulnerability in ChatGPT that allowed a single prompt to bypass the notional safeguards OpenAI had put in place.

title: OpenAI Patches ChatGPT Data Exfiltration Flaw and Codex GitHub Token Vulnerability
body: ChatGPT and Codex flaws patched Feb 2026 exposed DNS exfiltration and GitHub tokens, raising enterprise AI security risks.

body: Target changed its terms and conditions ahead of a Google Gemini integration. It signals that customers should look closely at what they buy via AI.

body: Google Gemini more than doubled its referral traffic to websites in two months while ChatGPT declined from its peak, SE Ranking data shows.

title: Google upgrades Gemini Live with Faster AI, expands Search Live to 200+ countries
body: Google has upgraded its Gemini Live feature with a faster AI model and expanded Search Live globally. The update brings quicker responses, smarter conversations, and real-time AI search support in over 200 countries.

title: How to embed AI into business processes without breaking the business
body: Studies show that many AI projects fail because AI tools are introduced without aligning them with the operational workflows employees rely on every day. Using no-code tools to embed AI into everyday business processes offers a solution.
